items.title: 3 Dead in Hantavirus Outbreak Aboard Cruise Ship, W.H.O. Says
items.summary: One case of hantavirus infection has been confirmed in a laboratory, and there are five additional suspected cases, the organization said on Sunday.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Iran says US has responded to its latest peace proposal
items.summary: The US is yet to formally confirm it has responded. However, Trump reportedly told Israel's Kan News it was unacceptable.

items.title: I am one of Brij Bhushan's six victims, reveals wrestler Vinesh Phogat
items.summary: Wrestler Vinesh Phogat revealed she is one of six accusers of former WFI chief Brij Bhushan Singh. Her return to competition in his stronghold, Gonda, raises concerns about fair...
